vorteil_1_desc: With over 20 years of ODM & OEM service experience, we are at your service 24/7.
vorteil_2_desc: Highest global safety standards protect your business and employees.
vorteil_3_desc: Optimized insulation and smart controls continuously reduce operating costs.
vorteil_4_desc: Hygienic stainless steel design with rounded corners for quick cleaning.
vorteile_intro: We are an industrial park dedicated to the design, R&D, production, and sales of commercial kitchen equipment and food processing machinery.
vorteile_kitchen: Commercial kitchen equipment includes cooking equipment (such as commercial gas stoves, induction cookers, steamers, fryers, and grills), refrigeration equipment (such as commercial refrigerators, freezers, display cabinets, and freezers), food preparation equipment (such as vegetable cutters, slicers, mixers, and food processors), baking equipment (such as deck ovens, convection ovens, dough sheeters, and noodle machines), and cleaning equipment (such as dishwashers, glass washers, and sterilizers).
vorteile_machinery: Food processing machinery includes meat processing equipment (such as meat grinders, sausage stuffers, and mixers), beverage equipment (such as commercial blenders, juicers, and coffee machines), and specialized processing equipment (such as ice machines, water boilers, and insulated cabinets).
vorteile_stats: Our factory has over 5,000 square meters of production workshops, more than 50 experienced engineers and technicians, providing you with high-quality products and professional services.
vorteile_subtitle: Our technology ensures stable results, making your craft outstanding.
user_agreement_intro: Welcome to Foshan YuKoLi Technology Co., Ltd. ("we," "us," or "our"). By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
user_agreement_section_1_content: By accessing our website, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our services.
user_agreement_section_2_content: Our services are specifically designed for B2B commercial kitchen equipment inquiries, quotations, and purchases. We specialize in fermentation cabinets, commercial ovens, and industrial kitchen solutions.
user_agreement_section_3_content: All product specifications, prices, and availability are subject to change without notice. Final pricing is confirmed upon official quotation.
user_agreement_section_4_content: All orders are subject to Incoterms 2020. Shipping costs, customs duties, and import taxes are the responsibility of the buyer unless otherwise agreed in writing.
user_agreement_section_5_content: Our products come with CE certification and comply with international food safety standards. Warranty terms are specified in the official sales contract.
privacy_policy_intro: Foshan YuKoLi Technology Co., Ltd. ("we," "us," or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.
privacy_section_1_content: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, phone number, and company details when you contact us or request a quote. We also collect non-personal information such as browser type and IP address.
privacy_section_2_content: We use your information to: (a) Process your inquiries and provide quotations; (b) Communicate about orders and deliveries; (c) Provide after-sales support; (d) Send product updates and promotional information (with your consent).
privacy_section_3_content: We process your data based on: (a) Contractual necessity for order fulfillment; (b) Legitimate interests in business operations; (c) Your consent for marketing communications; (d) Legal compliance requirements.
privacy_section_4_content: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with: (a) Shipping and logistics partners for delivery; (b) Payment processors for transaction handling; (c) Legal authorities when required by law.
privacy_section_5_content: As an international business, your data may be transferred to and processed in China and other countries where our service providers operate. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place.
privacy_section_6_content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, access controls, and regular security audits to protect your data from unauthorized access or disclosure.
privacy_section_7_content: You have the right to: (a) Access your personal data; (b) Request correction or deletion; (c) Object to processing; (d) Withdraw consent; (e) Request data portability. Contact us to exercise these rights.
user_agreement_section_6_content: All product designs, trademarks, and content on this website are the property of Foshan YuKoLi Technology Co., Ltd.
user_agreement_section_7_content: We shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our products or services.
user_agreement_section_8_content: These terms are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China. Any disputes shall be resolved through friendly negotiation or submitted to the competent courts in Foshan, Guangdong.
user_agreement_section_9_content: For any questions regarding these terms, please contact us via WhatsApp, email, or the contact form on our website.
privacy_section_8_content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacy_section_9_content: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.
privacy_section_10_content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy_section_11_content: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us via WhatsApp, email at support.kitchen@yukoli.com, or through our website contact form.
privacy_section_12_content: We use Facebook Pixel and similar tracking technologies to: (a) Measure advertising effectiveness; (b) Build targeted audiences for future ads; (c) Track conversions from Facebook ads. You can opt out of Facebook tracking through your Facebook ad preferences or by using browser do-not-track settings.
privacy_section_13_content: Our services are not directed to individuals under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe we have collected data from a minor, please contact us immediately.
privacy_section_14_content: We do not use automated decision-making or profiling that produces legal effects. All business decisions involve human review.
testimonial_1_text: Our 8 automated stir-fry machines have increased kitchen efficiency by 50%. They work 24/7 without breakdowns, ensuring stable meal output for 5,000+ daily orders. The intelligent temperature control maintains perfect wok-hei flavor consistency across all dishes.
testimonial_2_text: The smart deep fryers with automatic oil filtration deliver consistently perfect fried food. Oil lifespan increased by 70%, reducing costs by 40%. Our kitchen now produces 3,000 crispy items daily with zero variation in quality. The automated cleaning system saves 2 hours daily.
testimonial_3_text: Our 6 smart ovens with precision humidity control have boosted baking efficiency by 50%. The steam injection system produces bakery-quality bread consistently. We've reduced waste by 30% and increased daily output from 2,000 to 3,000 loaves without additional staff.
testimonial_4_text: The intelligent griddles maintain perfect surface temperature (±2°C), ensuring every steak is cooked exactly to order. Our chefs now handle 50% more covers during peak hours. The automatic grease management keeps the kitchen cleaner and safer.
testimonial_5_text: The vegetable processing line with smart cutting machines has reduced prep time by 60%. We process 2 tons of vegetables daily with just 2 operators instead of 8. Blade maintenance is automated, and the system has operated flawlessly for 18 months.
testimonial_6_position: Head Chef, Ho Chi Minh Central Kitchen
testimonial_6_text: Our fully automated wok stations fry 1,200 portions per hour vs 400 previously. The integrated ventilation system eliminates smoke completely. All 12 machines have run for 15,000 hours without a single major breakdown.
testimonial_7_text: The energy-efficient smart ovens reduced our electricity consumption by 35% across 4 hotel kitchens. The predictive maintenance feature alerts us before issues occur, preventing downtime. Our pastry section now produces 50% more with the same space.
testimonial_8_text: Combining automated woks with smart fryers has increased our stir-fry production capacity by 300%. We now serve 15,000 airline meals daily with consistent quality. The equipment's durability in 24/7 operation is exceptional.
testimonial_9_text: Our 28 locations standardized on SmartKitchen's complete intelligent kitchen system. Automated woks, ovens, griddles, and processors work in harmony, increasing overall kitchen efficiency by 50%. Remote monitoring ensures 99.9% uptime across all sites.
